name: theme-script
title: Theme toggle runtime
description: Dark/light toggle runtime, zero dependencies. Exports THEME_PREHIDE_JS (FOUC guard -- restores the stored theme before first paint) and initThemeToggle(buttonId) (click handler + localStorage persistence). Distinct from @astro-shad/theme (the CSS-only token-contract item) despite the similar name -- pairs with @astro-shad/theme-toggle, the component that wraps this runtime.
